body:
# Description

Design doc: https://microstrategy.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/~yuanli/pages/5728862732/Report+error+-+revert+instance
Server PR: https://github.com/mstr-kiai/server/pull/10905

## Root cause of the issue
Please explain what causes the issue

## Solution discussion
After call `mstrApp?.serverProxy?.cancelRequests?.(); `, it will trigger complete cmdMgr.reset();
Solution: Add isReCreateReportInstance to control whether to reset undo/redo list.

When it is modeling service manipulation, isReCreateReportInstance is false, when complete it will reset undo/redo list.

When it is a normal manipulation, isReCreateReportInstance is true, when complete, it will keep undo/redo list.
## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] This change requires a documentation update


# What is the impact?

Please consider the product that could be affected.

- [ ] Web platform
- [ ] Dossier Library 
- [ ] Workstation

Please consider external components that could be affected
- [ ] Export Engine
- [ ] RWD
